subject: [PATCH v3 27/28] nfsd: track requested dir attributes

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of directory attributes in NFSv4 by tracking the union of requested and supported dir attributes in the delegation. It ensures that only the attributes present in this union are encoded when sending add, remove, or rename updates to the client. This change aims to prevent unnecessary attribute encoding and improve performance.
